name: chat-notifyer
description: Live chat operations for Notifyer by WhatsAble — send messages, manage recipients, assign labels, control AI handoff, schedule messages, and manage notes via the Chat API.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/list-recipients.js && node --check scripts/get-recipient.js && node --check scripts/filter-recipients-by-label.js && node --check scripts/send-text.js && node --check scripts/send-template.js && node --check scripts/send-attachment.js && node --check scripts/assign-label.js && node --check scripts/remove-label.js && node --check scripts/set-handoff.js && node --check scripts/assign-bot.js && node --check scripts/list-bots.js && node --check scripts/list-scheduled.js && node --check scripts/delete-scheduled.js && node --check scripts/add-note.js && node --check scripts/get-notes.js && node --check scripts/get-conversation.js && node --check scripts/get-conversation-log.js && node --check scripts/update-recipient.js && echo 'All scripts OK'

author: WhatsAble
